task_completion.description: Open the correct blog post in the editor
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser shows the WordPress post editor with the title 'Exploring Modern Architecture Masterpieces'.

task_completion.description: Remove the broken images pointing to the legacy domain
task_completion.visual_evidence: The editor no longer displays broken image icons or blocks containing the URL 'http://legacy-site.local'.

task_completion.description: Insert guggenheim.jpg with the correct Alternative Text
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Guggenheim image is visible in the post editor, and the block settings sidebar or media library shows the 'Alternative Text' field set exactly to 'Guggenheim Museum Bilbao'.

task_completion.description: Insert bauhaus.jpg with the correct Alternative Text
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bauhaus image is visible in the post editor, and the block settings sidebar or media library shows the 'Alternative Text' field set exactly to 'Bauhaus Dessau Building'.

task_completion.description: Insert fallingwater.jpg with the correct Alternative Text
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Fallingwater image is visible in the post editor, and the block settings sidebar or media library shows the 'Alternative Text' field set exactly to 'Fallingwater House'.
A 'Post updated' notification is visible, or the 'Update' button in the top right is in a saved/disabled state, indicating the changes have been published.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to edit the post
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the WordPress web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands (like WP-CLI) or direct database edits to complete the task.

integrity.description: Images were inserted as actual image blocks
integrity.visual_evidence: The images appear as visual Image blocks in the WordPress editor, not as raw HTML code blocks or plain text links.

integrity.description: Alternative text was entered in the correct designated fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The alt text is entered into the specific 'Alternative Text' input box in the block settings sidebar or media library, not typed as a visible caption or regular paragraph text below the image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target post title: 'Exploring Modern Architecture Masterpieces'. Legacy domain to remove: 'legacy-site.local'. Required Alt Texts: 'Guggenheim Museum Bilbao' for guggenheim.jpg, 'Bauhaus Dessau Building' for bauhaus.jpg, and 'Fallingwater House' for fallingwater.jpg.
